description: system pressure when load/unload command is triggered
evidence: Maintains net pressure between programmable limits, automatically loads and unloads compressor

description: programmable upper pressure limit that triggers unloading
evidence: When net pressure reaches unloading pressure, solenoid valve (Y1) is de-energized

description: programmable lower pressure limit that triggers loading
evidence: When loading pressure reached, solenoid valve (Y1) is energized

description: pressure difference between loading and unloading setpoints
evidence: Pressure variations: 0.3 to 1 bar range (depends on permitted number of load/unload cycles per time unit)

description: state of loading solenoid valve y1 - energized for loading, de-energized for unloading
evidence: Solenoid valve (Y1) is de-energized for unloading, energized for loading

description: position of inlet valve during load/unload cycle
evidence: Loading plunger (LP) moves upwards → inlet valve (IV) closes air inlet opening

description: position of unloading valve during cycle
evidence: Unloading valve (UV) opened by receiver pressure → pressure from air receiver (AR) released towards unloader (UA)

description: final operating state after regulation cycle completion
evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded / Air output resumed (100%), compressor runs loaded

description: compressor air output percentage after regulation event
evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded / Air output resumed (100%), compressor runs loaded

description: control air pressure in loading/unloading valve chambers
evidence: Control pressure in chambers of loading plunger (LP) and unloading valve (UV) vented to atmosphere

description: indicates if regulator is in automatic operation mode during event
evidence: Automatic operation LED indicates regulator automatically controlling compressor: loaded, unloaded, stopped and restarted

description: programmable minimum time compressor must remain stopped
evidence: Programmable settings include minimum stop time

description: total time from start of load/unload trigger to completion
evidence: Load/unload regulation accepts larger variations in pressure between two limit values

description: pressure in air receiver tank during regulation event
evidence: Control pressure fed from air receiver (AR) via solenoid valve (Y1)

description: pressure level at which compressor automatically loads to resume air production
evidence: Loading pressure when pressure decreases to loading pressure

description: pressure level at which compressor automatically unloads to stop air production
evidence: Unloading pressure when net pressure reaches unloading pressure

description: actual pressure in compressed air system measured by pressure sensor pt20
evidence: Modulates between programmed unloading and loading pressures shown on main display

description: position of inlet valve iv controlling air flow into compressor element
evidence: Loading plunger LP moves downwards → inlet valve IV opens fully / moves upwards → inlet valve IV closes

description: position of unloading valve uv that releases pressure to atmosphere during unloaded operation
evidence: Unloading valve UV opened by receiver pressure / closes air blow-off opening

description: state of solenoid valve y1 controlling loading and unloading sequence
evidence: Solenoid valve Y1 is de-energized / energized

description: operating state indicating whether compressor is producing compressed air
evidence: Air output stopped 0%, compressor runs unloaded / Air output resumed 100%, compressor runs loaded

description: temperature measured at compressor element outlet by sensor tt11
evidence: Approx. 60 degrees celsius above cooling air temperature sensor TT11

description: pressure differential across oil separator element measured by pdt1
evidence: Below 1 bar pressure difference over oil separator sensor PDT1

description: led indicator showing regulator is automatically controlling load/unload cycles
evidence: Automatic operation LED lights up indicates regulator automatically controlling compressor loaded, unloaded, stopped

description: text message displayed showing current compressor operating state
evidence: Display message change From <<Auto unloaded>> to <<Auto loaded>>

description: pressure in control air system fed from air receiver to loading plunger and unloading valve
evidence: Control pressure fed from air receiver AR via solenoid valve Y1 to loading plunger LP and unloading valve UV

description: pressure difference between loading and unloading pressure limits for load/unload regulation
evidence: Load/Unload Regulation accepts larger variations in pressure between two limit values, pressure variations 0.3 to 1 bar range

description: programmed pressure level at which compressor unloads
evidence: Maintains net pressure between programmable limits, automatically loads and unloads compressor

description: programmed pressure level at which compressor loads
evidence: When net pressure decreases to loading pressure, solenoid valve energized

description: current air outlet pressure measured by pt20
evidence: Air outlet pressure reading modulates between programmed unloading and loading pressures

description: temperature at compressor element outlet measured by tt11
evidence: Approx. 60 degrees celsius above cooling air temperature

description: pressure difference across oil separator measured by pdt1
evidence: Pressure difference over oil separator reading below 1 bar

description: state of loading solenoid valve y1 during regulation
evidence: Solenoid valve Y1 is energized for loading, de-energized for unloading

description: position of inlet valve during load/unload cycle
evidence: Inlet valve opens fully for loading, closes for unloading

description: position of unloading valve during regulation cycle
evidence: Unloading valve opened by receiver pressure during unloading

description: current operating state shown on display
evidence: Display message changes from Auto unloaded to Auto loaded

description: compressor air output during loaded/unloaded state
evidence: Air output stopped (0%) when unloaded, resumed (100%) when loaded

description: permitted pressure variation between loading and unloading limits
evidence: Pressure variations 0.3 to 1 bar range for load/unload regulation

description: control air pressure in loading plunger and unloading valve chambers
evidence: Control pressure fed from air receiver via solenoid valve to loading plunger and unloading valve

description: programmable minimum time compressor remains stopped
evidence: Programmable settings include minimum stop time

description: time required to transition from unloaded to loaded state
evidence: Ten seconds after starting drive motor switches from star to delta, compressor starts running loaded

description: power consumption percentage during unloaded operation
evidence: Only 15-30% of full load power with off-loaded compressor (zero flow)

description: programmable pressure level at which compressor starts loading operation
evidence: Loading pressure: 7.0 bar(e) and maintains net pressure between programmable limits

description: programmable pressure level at which compressor starts unloading operation
evidence: Maximum unloaded pressure: 7.5 bar(e) and Unloading pressures programmable settings

description: current air outlet pressure measured by pressure sensor pt20
evidence: Air outlet pressure: Reading: Modulates between programmed unloading and loading pressures. Sensor: PT20

description: temperature at compressor element outlet measured by sensor tt11
evidence: Compressor element outlet temperature: Approx. 60 degrees celsius above cooling air temperature. Sensor: TT11

description: pressure difference across oil separator measured by pdt1
evidence: Pressure difference over oil separator: Reading: Below 1 bar. Sensor: PDT1

description: state of loading solenoid valve y1 controlling load/unload operation
evidence: When net pressure reaches unloading pressure: Solenoid valve (Y1) is de-energized. When loading pressure reached: Solenoid valve (Y1) is energized

description: position of inlet valve iv controlled by loading plunger lp
evidence: Loading plunger (LP) moves upwards → inlet valve (IV) closes air inlet opening. Loading plunger (LP) moves downwards → inlet valve (IV) opens fully

description: position of unloading valve uv that releases pressure to unloader
evidence: Unloading valve (UV) opened by receiver pressure → pressure from air receiver (AR) released towards unloader. Unloading valve (UV) closes air blow-off opening

description: current operational state indicating if compressor is producing air output
evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded. Air output resumed (100%), compressor runs loaded

description: percentage of compressor air output during load/unload cycle
evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded. Air output resumed (100%), compressor runs loaded

description: permitted pressure variation range between loading and unloading limits
evidence: Load/unload regulation: Pressure variations: 0.3 to 1 bar range depends on permitted number of load/unload cycles per time unit

description: pressure in control air system fed from air receiver to operate valves
evidence: Control pressure fed from air receiver (AR) via solenoid valve (Y1) to loading plunger (LP) and unloading valve (UV)

description: programmable minimum time compressor remains stopped to reduce power consumption
evidence: Programmable settings include: Minimum stop time. Stops compressor when possible to reduce power consumption

description: programmable minimum pressure threshold that triggers compressor loading
evidence: Maintains net pressure between programmable limits. Automatically loads and unloads compressor.

description: programmable maximum pressure threshold that triggers compressor unloading
evidence: Maintains net pressure between programmable limits. When net pressure reaches unloading pressure, solenoid valve Y1 is de-energized.

description: current compressed air system pressure measured by pressure sensor pt20
evidence: PT20: Pressure sensor, air outlet. Reading: Modulates between programmed unloading and loading pressures.

description: state of loading solenoid valve y1 controlling inlet valve operation
evidence: Solenoid valve Y1 is energized for loading, de-energized for unloading. Y1: Loading solenoid valve.

description: position of inlet valve iv controlling air intake to compressor element
evidence: Loading plunger LP moves downwards → inlet valve IV opens fully. LP moves upwards → inlet valve IV closes air inlet opening.

description: state of unloading valve uv that releases pressure during unloading
evidence: Unloading valve UV opened by receiver pressure → pressure from air receiver released towards unloader. UV closes air blow-off opening during loading.

description: temperature at compressor element discharge measured by sensor tt11
evidence: TT11: Temperature sensor, compressor element outlet. Reading: Approx. 60 degrees celsius above cooling air temperature.

description: time duration compressor operates in loaded state producing compressed air
evidence: Compressor runs loaded. Air output resumed (100%).

description: time duration compressor operates in unloaded state with zero air output
evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded. Minimum stop time programmable.

description: led indicator showing regulator is automatically controlling compressor load/unload cycles
evidence: Automatic operation LED (1) lights up. Indicates regulator automatically controlling compressor: loaded, unloaded, stopped and restarted.

description: display message indicating current compressor operating mode
evidence: Display message change: From <<Auto unloaded>> to <<Auto loaded>>.

description: compressed air flow rate output from compressor
evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded. Air output resumed (100%).

description: electrical power consumption during loaded operation
evidence: Energy consumption represents approximately 80% of total life cycle cost. Only 15-30% of full load power with off-loaded compressor.

description: electrical power consumption during unloaded operation
evidence: Only 15-30% of full load power with off-loaded compressor (zero flow).

description: actual pressure variation between loading and unloading pressure limits
evidence: Pressure variations: 0.3 to 1 bar range (depends on permitted number of load/unload cycles per time unit).
